abilities.name: Borrowed Time (Tome)
abilities.description: After failing, summon Void Wretch within 1 yard. Attacker must discard card or become Fast until next turn.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.description: Ignores other characters and terrain during movement. Reduce Ranged/Close Combat damage by half.

abilities.name: Pure Nothingness
abilities.description: At end of each Dramatic Time round, suffer cumulative -1 Df (minimum 0).

abilities.name: Terrifying (Living) (12)
abilities.description: Enemy Living characters must pass TN 12 Horror Duel when ending turn within engagement range or targeting this character.

abilities.name: Time is Meaningless
abilities.description: Gain ++ on all duels vs characters with Fast Condition.

actions: (1) Obliterate (Necromancy) | AV: 6 (14) | Rg: y3 | Resist: Wp | Target suffers 2/5/6 damage. Tome Glimpse the Void: Target must pass TN 13 Willpower duel or be removed from reality until end of round. Ram Evaporate: Target suffers Severe Critical Effect.
(0) Deja Vu (Prestidigitation) | AV: 6 (14) | Rg: 10 | Resist: Wp | Target becomes Slow. If was Fast, this character heals 2 damage and may teleport within 1 yard of target.
system.notes: Patient stalking predators. Ambush through solid surfaces. Each bite causes flesh to evaporate. Shedding fragments become new Void Wretches.
